# Who Is This

Mahasona (මහසෝනා) is a legendary demon from Sri Lankan folklore, feared as a powerful and vengeful spirit. According to myth, he was once a human warrior named Jayasena, a fierce general who fought in battle. However, after a deadly duel with another warrior named Gothabaya, Jayasena was beheaded. Through dark magic, his soul was cursed to wander the earth, and his head was replaced with that of a ferocious boar.

Now, Mahasona is known as a terrifying demon who roams graveyards, forests, and abandoned places at night, preying on those who cross his path. He is believed to have supernatural strength, the ability to control spirits, and a deadly roar that can paralyze his victims with fear. Many Sri Lankans still believe in his legend and perform rituals to protect themselves from his wrath.
